actionCalls.name: GetCountriesFromGlobalValueSet
actionCalls.label: Get Countries From Global Value Set

assignments.name: SetDeliveryAddressToFilteredAddress
assignments.label: Set Delivery Address to Filtered Address

decisions.name: ConfirmOrUseDifferentOrEnterManually
decisions.label: Confirm Or Use Different Or Enter Manually

decisions.name: PopulateUpdatedBusinessDetailsIfBusiness
decisions.label: Populate Updated Business Details If Business

Flow.description: A flow that allows users to change details and address information for their own accounts.

formulas.name: AddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!NumberOfAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!EnteredPostcode}, TEXT({!NumberOfAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!EnteredPostcode})

formulas.name: FilteredCountry
formulas.expression: CASE({!FilteredDeliveryPointAddress.COUNTRY_CODE}, "E", "England", "W", "Wales", "S", "Scotland", "N", "Northern Ireland", "L", "Channel Islands", "M", "Isle of Man", "J", "United Kingdom", "United Kingdom")

Flow.label: PRSE User Details Change

recordUpdates.name: UpdateAccountWithManualAddressInput
recordUpdates.label: Update Account With Manual Address Input

value.stringValue: Use this address,Use a different address,Enter address manually
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Use this address,Enter address manually,Search again

Change your contact details

These are the details that we may use to communicate with you.

Check your contact details

These are the details that we may use to communicate with you.
Your updated contact details have been saved
Enter an organisation or business name
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
You may be contacted on this number.

Your address

If your address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Postcode is not in a correct format
